item.title: One of the best things
item.description:
I build city parks as part of my job: splash pads, playgrounds, fancy sandboxes, etc. The new park I'm working in is the cleanest I've ever seen, despite it being in high density and a lower-income part of town. It turns out part of the reason it's so clean is there is a lovely woman living nearby who brings her Malinois to the park early every morning. She trained her dog to run around and pick up discarded bottles and cans, and then place them in the trash itself. She rewards her dog with hugs and praise.
Her name is Ms. Annie and she is a nine year old Shepard/Malinois mix. She works so fast she is hard to photograph.
Her owner told me she cleans up around the house and helps prep her own dog bowl too. She apparently took very little effort to train.
item.dc:creator: flukeysnail

item.title: Don't forget to buy your 2nd Trump bible soon!
item.dc:creator: ChocolatePoopy

item.title: Dump of very satisfying, touching, funny vids. Enjoy !
item.description:
Hobbit house ! I'll certainly go with her without hesitation ...
Things like this deserve nothing but respect ....
Doggo Secured.
Albert and Einstein.
What does the fox say ?
Penguins !
This doctor effortlessly resets a child's dislocated elbow before they could even react.
I know the shortcuts !
Maybe maybe maybe ....
She nailed it!
Years go by fast ...
Which one will prevail ?
Lemme chop some onions...
Brave Mother White Stork protects her chicks during the storm.
Pushing the limits of the make.
This lady making shiny spheres from dirt, this is called Dorodango.
Various species of mushrooms growing ...
Early 2000s Filipino Cracker Commercial ...
Calculated to the millimeter.
Crazy how the mind works.
Egg flower omelette.
They did not think about that ...
Linkage - 'from this way to that way' .
Bullseye !
No sense in telling him he's not a dog !
My lighthouse people need me !
Someone finally put a pro in the driver's seat !
An extremely satisfying shoe shine.
Outjorked by Fiot !
She got him good.
This is Xiaofeng, he gave up city life and built a village for his chicken in his home town in Wenzhou, China.
A Goated Tree !
Mascots on a different level ... What did they smoke ?
Power washing the roof.
Woking while rocking ! This Rocks !
A moment she will never forget !
In China, it's a tradition for the father of the bride to feed her one last time before her wedding ...
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: You can tell a lot about someone by what part of a book they remember.

item.title: Hunter Biden on tRump
item.description: I used to have sympathy for Hunter Biden and hoped he could overcome his demons, but now I can add admiration and respect to how I feel about him. He has owned what he did, recovered from it, and is doing something very worthwhile with his life. After all the unimaginable heartache his parents endured, they must be very proud of him. So am I.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1749 (endless trinkets)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Orthodox: no glass cover on the icon so you can kiss the skull directly.
Specifically, the Jagannath avatar of Vishnu.
You'd think this would be super creepy when on mushrooms but it was actually warm and comforting. Pando was watching over me. Sure, he would have ate my bones if I was dead, but i was not.
I am making stuff again: paintings, and learning woodworking. It's... strange.
My ace friends are like "yup, this tracks"
You don't have to be good, you don't have to monetize it. Just do it.
Hell yes. I would totally wave this around even more.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "noooo. [Existential undeterminate conure whispers, followed by kissing noises] _____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: GovBrief Today #531-
item.description: The federal government rewrote the story of slavery in the middle of last night. Park Service crews entered Philadelphia's Independence Park and stripped the memorial to the nine people George Washington enslaved. The new display says they enjoyed "a greater modicum of autonomy" under the man who owned them. A federal judge quoted Orwell when she ordered the original exhibit restored, calling the government's edits a Ministry of Truth. The government won its appeal, then proved her right. Autonomy, in the government's telling, means Washington bought the people he enslaved tickets to the theater and the circus. Rewriting history works best when people doubt first and forget later. Don't let them turn slavery into a rumor. I've emailed 8,247 stories over 531 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260715-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/wildfire-smoke [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july15 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ruemmler-epstein [4] https://go.govbrief.today/content-moderators [5] https://go.govbrief.today/gw-slavery [6] https://go.govbrief.today/nyt-subpoenas [7] https://go.govbrief.today/testosterone-military [8] https://go.govbrief.today/seattle-prosecutor [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-vehicle-stops [10] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-coins [11] https://go.govbrief.today/defund-israel [12] https://go.govbrief.today/clayton-blanche [13] https://go.govbrief.today/girls-school-ai [14] https://go.govbrief.today/bloomington-grants [15] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-nm Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/

item.title: Scary Nature (A Title And A Warning)
item.description:
July 23, 2024 off the coast of Rye, New Hampshire. A whale lands on a boat while lunge fishing capsizing the vessel. Both fisherman were quickly rescued and there were no injuries to the fishermen or the whale.
Las Delicias, Trujillo, Peru, during the Feria de San José in March 2026. Victim recieved severe injuries to his face but did survive.
Rabid beaver bites 8 year old boy while fishing before being fought off by Family.
Earthquake in Glan, Sarangani, in the southern Philippines on June 8, 2026.
Occured at a horse fair in Poland.
July 10, 2026 at Yellowstone National Park. Carl McDaniel (65) and his grandson are watching from a distance when an angry bison attacks. McDaniel had multiple broken bones requiring surgery but survived.
Elk hunter Jared Erickson is confronted by a mountain lion in Idaho in 2022. He uses his handgun to scare it off.
EF-2 tornado touches down in Barrie, Ontario, on July 15, 2021.
https://edition.cnn.com/2026/06/29/world/live-news/venezuela-earthquake-hnk
Redcar Racecourse in England on May 20, 2026. 25-year-old head groom Chloe Briody was violently kicked by a thoroughbred named Kameko Fever. Briody suffered only bruises.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SjzomXax-K4 "Rock Cobbler," an off-road gravel bike race held in Bakersfield, California.
Jessie Peterson and her dog Shoki in Kananaskis Country, Alberta, Canada. A bear contemplates attacking but Peterson, a wilderness guide, threw her coffee cup and slowly backed away or even remained stationary at some points to deter the bear. Both Peterson and Shoki were unharmed.
Couldn't find much info on this clip. Possibly from a rice field in Vietnam. I have so many questions...why did neither retreat? Who was the aggressor?
Another video that I researched for too long before giving up. I couldn't find any info on this video or the participant, He is moving and conscious after the landing so I thought it was okay to include.

item.title: Ye olde Whiskey Raccoon statue
item.description: UPDATE! That trip led him to Wild Bill's Western Store, a shop known for its taxidermy displays. Among the cowboy hats and snakeskin boots, Haaland spotted a stuffed raccoon. He could not resist. He paid $750 for it. He also picked up two taxidermized squirrels, one dressed as a sheriff, and another gripping a can of Budweiser, at roughly $450 to $500 each. Store owner Julie Newport later told The Athletic of the New York Times that Haaland simply gravitated toward the display the moment he walked in. He posted about the haul on Snapchat, calling the animals "Geezahs." For a while, that was it. A funny story from a shopping trip. Haaland explained the whole thing with a single Instagram caption. "It followed me home. " The post has since crossed 6.6 million likes. He also opened a poll asking followers to help name his new companion, offering Cowboy, Ranger, TEX, and R.O.W., short for Raccoon On Wheels. R.O.W. is currently winning as usual.
item.dc:creator: awesomeoldguy

item.title: The Clip-On Bangs Hack
item.description:
Little trick I picked up from cosplaying that is also applicable to day to day life! Hope this helps folks who might have a similar issue to me of going silver at like... 19 lol For my Trans Girlies: It’s kinda been a cliche to hear trans women tell other trans women to just do bangs and embrace passing, but I feel that’s not just a base standard lol Maybe I’m wrong, but regardless, hope this hackhelpos if you’re an old like me and need to make the clip on match a little better - it's far easier to maintain :) Also yes I saw I spelled it seceret... I regert nothing
Final Look!
And with the Nerd Cred gone...

item.title: Don't just get informed. Get active.
item.description: He's the former US Secretary of Labor https://www.instagram.com/reel/DO1HztJEy-I/?l=1 https://youtu.be/RUQAqXYDH70 How do you stay sane when the situation is so dire? The choices are to do something or try to find relief in ignoring. We can't afford to do nothing and its relief is temporary. So how can you get informed and take action without being overwhelmed? You do what you can and do your best to enjoy the rest of your time when you're not taking action. Then how do you know what action to take and that it will work? There is no quick fix or guaranteed solution. It is the constant and varied efforts that have always made these assholes lose when they try to take power.
item.dc:creator: ChewyTheWookie

item.title: The man can’t miss
item.description:
https://abc7ny.com/post/nyc-mayor-zohran-mamdani-rental-ripoff-report-strengthen-housing-code-violations-tenants-express-common-frustrations/19520925/
Mamdani is the best example of “if they wanted to, they would” there is in politics. Every democratic mayor across the country could be doing at least some of these things. Put socialists in charge shit gets done! If Socialist politicians are friendly to society, capitalist politicians are gonna be friendly to… CAPITAL. Meaning landlords, big business, investors, lobbyists, etc.

item.title: This Is a Dangerous Escalation in Political Rhetoric
item.description: Front page edit. Hey, y'all.I am actually trying to make this into something. I could really use the help with people subscribing on the YouTube. I'm really trying to increase that number. If any of you would take the time to click the link below that goes to this video, a quick subscribe and upvote would be paramount to me.I want to be able to get my voice out like I used to. Please hit the like button to fight the bots. This is a message to everybody, not just Americans. Pay attention to what is going on in America. The current administration is trying to set it up so they declare more than half of the country an enemy of the state. Let me know what you think about this in the comments. https://youtube.com/shorts/CdCRLzcEg_0
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered
